'''rajuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fod|fod]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fod|fod]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rajuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræjivith|ræjivith]] || [[word:ræjivij|ræjivij]] || [[word:ræjivish|ræjivish]] || [[word:ræjivi|ræjivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rajujuvuth|rajujuvuth]] || [[word:rajujuvuj|rajujuvuj]] || [[word:rajujuvush|rajujuvush]] || [[word:rajujuvu|rajujuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rajuvuth|rajuvuth]] || [[word:rajuvuj|rajuvuj]] || [[word:rajuvush|rajuvush]] || [[word:rajuvu|rajuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rajufvuth|rajufvuth]] || [[word:rajufvuj|rajufvuj]] || [[word:rajufvush|rajufvush]] || [[word:rajufvuf|rajufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rajuvuthu|rajuvuthu]] || [[word:rajuvuju|rajuvuju]] || [[word:rajuvushu|rajuvushu]] || [[word:rajuvuku|rajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rajuvuth|rajuvuth]] || [[word:rajuvuj|rajuvuj]] || [[word:rajuvush|rajuvush]] || [[word:rajuvu|rajuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rajuvuthul|rajuvuthul]] || [[word:rajuvujul|rajuvujul]] || [[word:rajuvushul|rajuvushul]] || [[word:rajuvukul|rajuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rajuvuthuthu|rajuvuthuthu]] || [[word:rajuvujuju|rajuvujuju]] || [[word:rajuvushushu|rajuvushushu]] || [[word:rajuvuku|rajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rajuvuthun|rajuvuthun]] || [[word:rajuvujun|rajuvujun]] || [[word:rajuvushun|rajuvushun]] || [[word:rajuvukun|rajuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rajuvuthuoro|rajuvuthuoro]] || [[word:rajuvujuoro|rajuvujuoro]] || [[word:rajuvushuoro|rajuvushuoro]] || [[word:rajuvukuoro|rajuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
